quote.issuer_name: Cofoe Medical Technology Co., Ltd. - H Shares
quote.nm: Cofoe Medical Technology Co., Ltd. - H Shares
quote.summary: Cofoe Medical Technology Co Ltd is a China-based company primarily engaged in the research and development, manufacturing and sales of home care medical devices. The Company's products mainly cover five areas. The rehabilitation aids products include orthopedic and posture correction products, hearing aids and others. The medical care products include dressing products, infection control products and others. The health monitoring products include thermometer, blood glucose &uric acid monitor and others. The respiratory support products include ventilator, nebulizer and others. The tradition Chinese medicine (TCM) therapy and other products include TCM physiotherapy devices, household and personal care products, mother and infant products, daily necessities and dietary supplement products. The Company is also engaged in offering logistics and warehousing services, and online store management services. The Company conducts its business in the domestic and overseas markets.
